images.caption: Figure 1:Discipline Distribution inSciAtlas.SciAtlasis a large-scale scientific knowledge graph containing 26 disciplines with over 43M academic papers and other heterogeneous entities.

Figure 2:Schema ofSciAtlas. By integrating 9 kinds of entity nodes and 12 kinds of relational edges,SciAtlasprovides a structured topological cognitive substrate that dismantles disciplinary barriers and furnishes AI agents with a global perspective. The complete schema (including entities, relations, attributions) ofSciAtlascan be found in Appx.A.
